title: NAME column differs between docker and podman search
body:
/kind bug


**Description**

Mismatch in column information for results of _podman_ versus _docker search_.

```
vagrant@devel libpod]$ sudo docker search devel.example.com/alpine
INDEX         NAME                                                               DESCRIPTION   STARS     OFFICIAL   AUTOMATED
example.com   devel.example.com/docker_hub/alpine                                              0                    
example.com   devel.example.com/examplecorp-dockerhub-1_0-dockerhub-alpine                     0                    
example.com   devel.example.com/examplecorp-dockerhub-alpine                                   0                    
example.com   devel.example.com/examplecorp-library-dockerhub-dockerhub-alpine                 0                    
example.com   devel.example.com/examplecorp-quayio-coreos_alpine-sh                            0                    
[vagrant@devel libpod]$ sudo bin/podman search devel.example.com/alpine
INDEX         NAME                                                         DESCRIPTION   STARS   OFFICIAL   AUTOMATED
example.com   example.com/examplecorp-dockerhub-alpine                                   0                  
example.com   example.com/examplecorp-quayio-coreos_alpine-sh                            0                  
example.com   example.com/examplecorp-dockerhub-1_0-dockerhub-alpine                     0                  
example.com   example.com/examplecorp-library-dockerhub-dockerhub-alpine                 0                  
example.com   example.com/docker_hub/alpine                                              0                  
```

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
$ sudo bin/podman version
Version:       0.8.1-dev
Go Version:    go1.9.4
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64

```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```
$ sudo bin/podman info
host:
  MemFree: 827756544
  MemTotal: 8201945088
  SwapFree: 1604804608
  SwapTotal: 1610608640
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 2
  hostname: devel.example.com
  kernel: 3.10.0-862.2.3.el7.x86_64
  os: linux
  uptime: 12h 58m 54.13s (Approximately 0.50 days)
insecure registries:
  registries: []
registries:
  registries:
  - docker.io
  - registry.centos.org
  - registry.access.redhat.com
store:
  ContainerStore:
    number: 0
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions:
  - overlay.override_kernel_check=true
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
  ImageStore:
    number: 0
  RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage


```

comments.body: are you talking about the devel.example.com vs example.com?
@baude - Yes, the NAME column should be what a user would _podman pull_ but certainly leaving off the "devel" portion of "devel.example.com" would not work.
it looks like you are running a local registry.  do you i understand that correctly?  can you paste how that is populated, etc so it can be replicated exactly?
also include what registry you are running

```
$ docker version
Client:
 Version:         1.13.1
 API version:     1.26
 Package version: docker-1.13.1-68.gitdded712.el7.centos.x86_64
 Go version:      go1.9.4
 Git commit:      dded712/1.13.1
 Built:           Tue Jul 17 18:34:48 2018
 OS/Arch:         linux/amd64

Server:
 Version:         1.13.1
 API version:     1.26 (minimum version 1.12)
 Package version: docker-1.13.1-68.gitdded712.el7.centos.x86_64
 Go version:      go1.9.4
 Git commit:      dded712/1.13.1
 Built:           Tue Jul 17 18:34:48 2018
 OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
 Experimental:    false
```

The registry I wrote and is incorporated into foreman.
